title: US, Israel suffer casualties as Iran retaliates over Khamenei's death | ABC NEWS
description: The US and Israel have suffered the first casualties in exchanges of fire with Iran after Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei was killed in Operation Epic Fury.  Three US military personnel and at least nine Israeli citizens have been killed in separate Iranian attacks, as US President Donald Trump warned American lives could be lost in the conflict.  Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the killing of the Ayatollah was only the beginning of Israeli military action, while Iranian President Masoud Prezeshkian promised 'consequences' for Israel and the US. title: Civilian buildings hit in Dubai, Bahrain as Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz | ABC NEWS
description: Iran has struck several Gulf countries hosting US military bases in retaliation of the US-Israel killing of the country’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.  Hotels, airports and other civilian buildings in Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates have been hit in Iranian attacks, as air travel through the Middle East is frozen.  The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has forced more than a hundred tankers have been forced to drop anchor as the congestion triggered a rise in oil prices. title: Ali Khamenei's death triggers widespread protests in Pakistan and India | ABC NEWS
description: Protests have erupted in Pakistan, India and Indian-controlled Kashmir after the killing of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.  Angry protesters were mourning the death of their spiritual leader and condemning the US-Israel military operation against Iran.  At least nine demonstrators were killed after the US consulate in Karachi was breached.
